channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  5. Friday papers: ‘Doomsday scenario’ for global energy markets  Citywire

item.title: Oil prices could reach record highs, analysts warn. Here's what it could mean for the U.S. economy. - CBS News
item.description:
1. Oil prices could reach record highs, analysts warn. Here's what it could mean for the U.S. economy.  CBS News
  2. America may be a petrostate. But the energy shock still hurts  The Economist
  3. The U.S. Economy Is Insulated From High Oil Prices. Americans Aren’t.  The New York Times
  4. US to Send Thousands More Marines to Mideast, Report Says  Bloomberg.com
  5. Far from war, global fuel frustrations mount  Yahoo
